blocks.content: It was Savannah who saw them first.
Thursday after school, the four of them walking out, and Savannah caught Kit's arm and tilted her head toward the parking lot without saying anything.
Brooke and Ryan. At his car. Close the way people stand when they've decided to be close.
Daisy watched for a moment, then blinked and turned away.
They walked to the bike rack. Kit fell into step next to Daisy.

blocks.speaker: Daisy
blocks.content: Yeah. I think they make sense.
She looked at him. He held steady. It was true.
They got their bikes and rode home and didn't mention it again.
